subject_a: We built something for Toast Catering
subject_b: The one thing missing from your on-site cooking pitch
subject_c: Turn Toast Catering site visitors into booked events
body:
Hi,

After 15 years of cooking on-site at San Diego weddings and events, your reputation clearly speaks for itself — those testimonials about food quality are hard to earn in catering.

But right now, someone planning their wedding can't request a quote or see pricing without hunting for a way to contact you, which means you're losing leads to competitors with easier booking.

We built Toast Catering a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that can answer menu questions, check availability, and capture event details 24/7: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/toastcatering/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
